mission.title: prometheus: Load scrape configs from multiple files
mission.description: Load scrape configs from multiple files. This issue affects 70+ users.

steps.title: Identify prometheus feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your prometheus deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=prometheus
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Load scrape configs from multiple files

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant prometheus resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
This issue is about providing the ability to split Prometheus scrape configs into multiple files.

Design doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bSehbL_Rzx9_guVgISmara-Ft_FB57q_YxEZtwxE3C8/edit#head

steps.title: Apply the fix for Load scrape configs from multiple files
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
global: 
   scrape_interval: 10s
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
    - targets: ['localhost:9090']
scrape_config_files:
  - blackbox.yml
```

steps.title: Confirm Load scrape configs from multiple files is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: This issue was resolved by applying the fix from the linked PR. The root cause was identified and addressed by the community.
codeSnippets:
global: 
   scrape_interval: 10s
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
    - targets: ['localhost:9090']
scrape_config_files:
  - blackbox.yml

scrape_configs:
 - job_name: 'blackbox'
    metrics_path: /probe
    params:
      module: [http_2xx]
    static_configs:
      - targets:
        - http://prometheus.io
        - https://prometheus.io
        - http://example.com:8080
    relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__address__]
        target_label: __param_target
      - source_labels: [__param_target]
        target_label: instance
      - target_label: __address__
        replacement: 127.0.0.1:9115  # The blackbox exporter's real hostname:port.

global:
  scrape_interval: 5s
  evaluation_interval: 15s

scrape_config_files:
  - /etc/prometheus/scrape_configs/*.yml

scrape_configs:
  - job_name: prometheus
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['prometheus:9090']

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible.
